meta.name: Founding Design Partner Qualification
meta.notes: Single source of truth for the eligibility form. Import the questions, then set up the `logic` rules and `endings` manually in your form builder (Tally/Typeform). See README in this folder.

settings.disqualifyNote: Tally free cannot auto-block consumer domains; screen Gmail/Outlook/Proton/iCloud manually or enforce in a native build.

welcome.title: Founding Design Partner Qualification
welcome.text: We only accept 6 Founding Design Partners this quarter. This quick 60-second form helps us see if we're a great fit — before we invest engineering time in your setup.

questions.title: What is the main type of sensitive work your team does?
How many people in your firm would actively use the private AI?
Have you or your team hesitated to use public AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) with client or sensitive data?
What is your biggest current bottleneck that AI could help solve?
questions.placeholder: e.g. "reviewing 100+ page contracts", "summarizing due diligence files"…

contact.heading: Almost done — where do we send your fit assessment?

fields.label: Business Email (we don't review personal Gmail/Outlook addresses)

logic.description: Evaluate rules top-down; first match wins. If no rule matches, fall through to 'potential_fit'.

endings.title: Excellent Match. ✅
endings.text: You look like a strong Founding Design Partner. Let's get you set up before the 6 slots fill.

endings.title: Potential Fit.
endings.text: We'd like to learn more about your workflows before we deploy. Grab a slot and let's talk.

endings.title: Thank you.
endings.text: We're currently focusing on firms with regular sensitive-document workflows. We'll keep your details and reach out if that changes — no spam.
